microsoft_ft: Architected and scaled Azure's **resilience validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a self-service system sustaining 45+ annual drills, driving **$14M+ impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 build** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining architecture requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that reduced operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable production-readiness testing.

Served as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility and translating compliance requirements into actionable engineering specs.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program, delivering in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects — establishing a new model for continuous infrastructure validation at scale.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating applied automation across distributed cloud infrastructure.
microsoft_2023: Drove **enterprise adoption** of AI-powered code generation workflows, conducting technical demos and enablement sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and validating production-readiness of new tooling.

Shaped product roadmap by facilitating **11+ technical discovery sessions** with Azure engineering stakeholders, surfacing critical feature gaps and securing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation capabilities.

Improved infrastructure documentation retrieval by migrating to an **AI-powered semantic search** system with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving signal quality for distributed engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Led technical discovery across 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths — mirroring the architecture design and integration planning work of a solutions role.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact infrastructure improvements with quantifiable business justification.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping system dependencies across 1,200+ stations — applying distributed systems thinking to a large-scale production deployment.

Implemented automated **CI/CD pipelines** in collaboration with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing repeatable infrastructure for ongoing rollouts.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and unblock cross-functional execution across hardware and software teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end sales operations lifecycle — building a CRM workflow to manage 200+ monthly proposals and streamlining the scoping-to-invoicing process for enterprise and residential clients.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rate by 2.7% by executing a digital-first GTM strategy, optimizing web presence and search profiles to improve top-of-funnel performance.

Conducted financial analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and improve leadership pricing models, delivering actionable profitability recommendations tied to operational and cost data.
